headline: BOX's Q4 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Shares Rise
summary: Box beats Q4 earnings estimates with 17% EPS growth and a 9% revenue rise, expands margins and lifts shares despite a 12 month slump.

headline: Buy These 5 Dividend Growth Stocks Amid Middle East Tensions
summary: Amid Middle East tensions, Astec Industries and four dividend growers stand out for steady payouts, solid growth and resilient fundamentals.
